title: Automation option to delete all items in a group
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m looking for the following automation option where I can delete all items in a group when a new item is created.

posts.author: vmull29 (V)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m looking for the following automation option where I can delete all items in a group when a new item is created.

posts.author: rachelmeltzerlee (Rachel Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! Are you talking about when a specific item is created, delete all items in a group, or just any new item! Could you please give me a little more context on your situation - I think I may have a solution or workaround for this!

posts.author: vmull29 (V)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
My situation is there is a specific item where the item name is always the same but other factors (ex. due date, status, and assignees) is different. These specific items are sent to the same group on the board. I would like to set up an automation where when a new specific item is created, all the other items in the group are deleted.
